evaluators.name: Earliest Weekday Speech Evaluation at Downtown Clinic Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user submitted an evaluation-specific slot request for a 5-year-old speech evaluation at the Main Clinic - Downtown, choosing the earliest weekday slot between May 10–20 at or after 3:00 PM.

evaluators.name: Autism Therapist for Teens – Experience & Appointment Evaluator
evaluators.description: Verifies that the user searched for autism specialists for teens, compared the top two most-experienced therapists, favorited the more experienced one, and submitted a teen appointment request with day/time preferences.

evaluators.name: Save Sensory Processing Articles (Ages 3–5) and Open Reading List Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user saved at least three qualifying sensory processing articles for ages 3–5 (≥5 minutes reading time) and opened the saved reading list.

evaluators.name: Register for Earliest Social Skills Group Next Month (Ages 8–10, Under $50) Evaluator
evaluators.description: Evaluates whether the user registered a child aged 8–10 for the earliest-starting qualifying social skills group next month costing under $50, with a valid session option selected.

evaluators.name: Cost Estimate for 4 Speech + 2 OT with Copay-After-Deductible Plan Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user calculated a monthly estimate for 4 speech therapy and 2 occupational therapy sessions under the in-network plan whose notes mention copay after deductible, and then requested a detailed quote mentioning that plan and session mix.

evaluators.name: Nearest Saturday Clinic with Free Parking Callback Evaluator
evaluators.description: Verifies that the user requested a callback from the nearest clinic within 15 miles of ZIP 94110 that offers free parking and is open on Saturdays, including a Saturday-related note and preferred call time.

evaluators.name: Weekly Plan with Specified Speech, OT, and Counseling Sessions Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that a weekly plan was saved for one child including the three specific sessions (speech Tue 4:00 PM, OT Thu 5:30 PM, counseling Sat 11:00 AM) and that the plan has a custom name.

evaluators.name: One-Time $75 Therapy Scholarship Fund Pledge In Honor Of Evaluator
evaluators.description: Verifies that the user submitted a one-time $75 pledge to the therapy scholarship fund that provides need-based therapy scholarships for children, dedicated in honor of “The Garcia Family,” with email as preferred contact method.
